Westmoreland Hills 35

  • Westmoreland Hills, St. James
  • 8 guests
  • 4 bedroom
  • 4.5 bathroom
  • Beach Club Membership

Discover Westmoreland Hills 35, a luxurious villa on Barbados’ platinum coast in the gated Westmoreland Hills community. This haven offers sea views for up to 8 guests in four en suite bedrooms. Enjoy a private pool, terrace, Wi-Fi, and air conditioning, with housekeeping once every 7 days.

The open-plan living area includes a flat-screen TV, breakfast island, and kitchen. Folding doors open to the terrace with an infinity pool. Two master bedrooms feature sea-view terraces, and bedrooms three and four offer twin beds that can convert to kings.

Guests enjoy Fairmont Royal Pavilion Beach Membership.

The elevated location offers sea views and proximity to the West Coast’s attractions, with quick access to beaches, restaurants, and a supermarket. Golf enthusiasts are near Royal Westmoreland and Sandy Lane’s Golf Courses. The villa includes parking for 2 vehicles, with guest parking near the clubhouse.

Our Guests, Their Words

Our guests' words capture the beauty and comfort of Barbados living.

view all reviews on airbnb
The villa is spacious, very clean and modern with all amenities. The beds are very...
The villa is spacious, very clean and modern with all amenities. The beds are very comfortable. The private pool and outdoor area was clean with lots of seating for everyone. It also has a nice view of the sea and wonderful sunsets. We love the quiet gated community. Our host Maisha is very friendly, courteous and helpful She answered our questions promptly and was always available when needed. All staff were nice. I will definitely stay here again.
 

Al

May 2025 · Stayed with kids

Spent 3 weeks in this beautiful villa. It exceeded our expectations to the full. Felt...

Spent 3 weeks in this beautiful villa. It exceeded our expectations to the full. Felt at home from start to finish. It was immaculate, peaceful, the beds so comfortable, great kitchen and georgeous pool and outdoor space fantastic!!
A big Thankyou to Maisha, Marium and all the team for making our stay exceptional from the cleaners, car rental and for organising a great chef - Jamal who cooked the most amazing food for us and all our family and friends - he even did all the tidying up after!! A real bonus.
All in all fabulous and can’t wait to return

Lizzie

February 2025 · Stayed over a week

Villa is beautiful. Sunsets every evening over the sea.Highly recommend.
